nicheHealth.label: Competitive
nicheHealth.insight: 6.5 Creedmoor content saturating but 6.5 PRC and 300 PRC comparison content has almost no dominant video under 500K subs

outliers.title: I Shot 1,000 Yards With a $600 Rifle — Here's What Happened
outliers.whyItWorked: Impossible-sounding achievement + specific budget + honest documentation = viewer has to click to find out if it's real
outliers.thumbnailStyle: Distant target, bullet impact dust, large 1000 YDS overlay, creator with rifle

outliers.title: Why Everyone Is Wrong About the 6.5 Creedmoor in 2026
outliers.whyItWorked: Contrarian take on the internet's most debated cartridge + year recency + everyone is wrong framing = massive comment engagement
outliers.thumbnailStyle: 6.5 Creedmoor ammo close-up, red 'WRONG?' overlay, instructor looking direct at camera

outliers.title: The 5 Mistakes Killing Your Long-Range Accuracy (And How to Fix Them)
outliers.whyItWorked: Mistake-framing + promised fix + accuracy anxiety among LR shooters = self-qualifying audience who watches 90%+
outliers.thumbnailStyle: Missed target, frustrated shooter, large red X, number 5

titleFormula.formula: Impossible Achievement or Why Everyone is Wrong + Specific Distance/Caliber + Honest Result or Fix

thumbnailPattern.value: Long-distance target shots, caliber comparisons, or missed impact — technical audience responds to data and visual proof over lifestyle shots

nextVideo.title: I Shot 1,000 Yards With a $600 Rifle — Here's the Honest Result
nextVideo.angle: Impossible-sounding budget achievement creates massive curiosity gap — the audience suspects it won't work, making the honest documentation irresistible
nextVideo.scriptHook: Most people will tell you that you need to spend two thousand dollars minimum to shoot reliably at a thousand yards. I decided to test that assumption with a six-hundred-dollar rifle, factory ammunition, and no gunsmithing. This is the honest documentation of what actually happened — the misses, the adjustments, and eventually the hits. No cherry-picked footage.
hooks: People say you need $2,000+ to shoot 1,000 yards. I tried it with $600. Here's what actually happened.
I tested the cheapest viable long-range setup I could build. The results surprised me.
Can a $600 rifle actually hit at 1,000 yards? I documented the whole process honestly.
reasons: Achievement-framing with impossible-sounding goal is the #1 CTR driver in long-range content this month
Budget-accessibility content is growing 2.3× faster than premium content in this niche — the audience is expanding beyond enthusiasts to new shooters
Wednesday noon window captures the lunch-break research habit confirmed by 3 of this week's top outliers

competitorPulse.note: Budget framing working well for him — confirms the accessibility angle is right for Week 1
Caliber comparisons are his consistent top performers — good framing for Week 2 6.5 vs 6.5 PRC piece
Beginner-focused content hitting well — audience is expanding, your budget achievement angle catches this wave

shortsIdeas: 45-sec: Show the $600 rifle hitting at 500 yards as a teaser — end with '1,000 yards in the full video'
30-sec: One overlooked zero mistake that ruins long-range accuracy — quick tip, drives to full video
60-sec: 6.5 Creedmoor vs 6.5 PRC in 60 seconds — quick comparison teaser, drives to full Week 2 video
trendingQuestions: What's the best caliber for long-range shooting under $1,500?
Can you really shoot 1,000 yards with a budget rifle?
What's better — 6.5 Creedmoor or 6.5 PRC for hunting?

seasonalAlert.title: Pre-Season Long Range Practice Content
seasonalAlert.content: Hunters using long-range rifles are entering pre-season practice mode. Practice, accuracy improvement, and setup optimization content performs well in summer months as hunters prepare for fall seasons.

gapAnalysis.title: No dominant 'budget 1,000 yard rifle' video under 300K subs in the last 18 months
gapAnalysis.reason: The topic has massive search demand but most existing results are either from very large channels or 3+ years old. Authentic, recent documentation has a clear path to ranking.
